REPLY TO PLAINTIFFS OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210038771) FILED BY DEFENDANT PAYCHEX BUSINESS SOLUTIONS, LLC

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-12-2023 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PAYCHEX BUSINESS SOLUTIONS, LLC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41(A), WHICH REQUIRES THAT "THE RESPONDING PARTY SHALL MEET AND CONFER AGAIN WITH THE PARTY WHO FILED THE AMENDED PLEADING BEFORE FILING A DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED PLEADING." THE MEET AND CONFER COMMUNICATIONS DATED A YEAR PRIOR TO THE AMENDED PLEADING IS INSUFFICIENT. (KHASLA DECL. 2, 3.) THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JULY 10, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PAYCHEX BUSINESS SOLUTIONS, LLC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Paychex Business Solutions, LLC's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41(a), which requires that "the responding party shall meet and confer again with the party who filed the amended pleading before filing a demurrer to the amended pleading." The meet and confer communications dated a year prior to the amended pleading is insufficient. (Khasla Decl. 2, 3.) The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the amended complaint is now due by July 10, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
